scripts.assets:js: terser public/js/check.js -c -m -o public/js/check.min.js && terser public/js/player.js -c -m -o public/js/player.min.js && terser public/js/script.js -c -m -o public/js/script.min.js && terser public/js/toploading.js -c -m -o public/js/toploading.min.js
scripts.assets:build: npm run assets:scss && npm run assets:js
scripts.dev: npm run assets:build && concurrently -k "next dev -p 1234" "npm run assets:watch"
scripts.build:prod: ([ -f .env.local ] && mv .env.local .env.local.bak || true) && npm run assets:build && next build; s=$?; ([ -f .env.local.bak ] && mv .env.local.bak .env.local || true); exit $s
